subject: docs: fix stale comments and add MVP operator note
body:
- CLAUDE.md: note ConditionBuilder exposes 5 of 10 operators in MVP
- FieldPropertiesPanel: update comments from "Conditional visibility" to
  "Only show based on answers" matching current UI label
- EmbedCodeDialog: update comments from "Direct iframe" to "Simple embed"
  matching current UI label
